text: I found my lollipop!
Have you seen this lollipop?
I love it when it's sunny
I'm in 3rd grade
Have you seen my mom?
I’ll give you my lollipop if you upgrade my ticket
Stand up straight! Your posture is just awful
My mom is working in research!
I want to be a scientist someday!
I'm worried about this research.
I'm calling it right now. There's something dubious happening at the research lab.

nodeGenericAnyChars: Hiya!
Hope you're having a nice day.
You look exhausted.
How are the kids?
When are you going to retire?
Lovely weather we're having!
Ew was there a fish here recently? It stinks!
Hoping for some rain this weekend.
Did you hear they're raising our taxes?
I'm going to see my long-distance friend! We haven't seen each other in years.
I'm going on my first vacation in a decade!
I'm running from my past.
Did you know that train reaches speeds of up to 57 leagues per hour?! It's so fast!
Hurry and punch my ticket, are you seriously checking my ID??!
Have you seen my propellor hat? I must’ve left it on a train
Have you seen my top hat? I must’ve left it on a train
Have you seen my green hat? I must’ve left it on a train
What’re you looking for on my ID? You like my photo, handsome?
That’s me in the picture, let me through already
It’s so hard keeping track of these tickets, back in my day we just kissed the conductor
It’s so hard keeping track of these tickets, back in my day we just paid at the door
It’s so hard keeping track of these tickets, back in my day we just asked for forgiveness, not permission
I’ve been waiting in line forever
Do you call it a train or a trolley?
My neighbor told me those shuttles take you away for good, is that true?

text: There's something off with those researchers.
The people who come back from that lab smell funny.
I hear screams at night sometimes.
I heard Crustacean Corporation is experimenting on those poor people!
You should vote for fish rights even if you're not a fish.
Hey at least all of the predators are doing this voluntarily. And they're getting paid for it!
Do you think any research positions are still open?
Crustacean corp offered me a job, but there’s something not right about those guys
I’m volunteering for the new research project!

nodeNonCrustacean: Did you see my son come through here yesterday? He didn’t come home!
nodeCrustacean: I’m relieved to see a fellow crustacean in the train business
They’re just letting anyone onto these trains nowadays
